author: DanielOnDiordna
name: Missions add-on
description: Add-on to add extra functionality for the missions plugin (up to version 0.3.0): 1: Optionally search for all missions within visible range, not just the top 25 (be aware: using this option will increase your server requests). 2: Sort the loaded missions by title (including roman numbers). 3: Show and remove stored missions. 4: Selected mission color changed to red. 5. Displayed missions show filled start portal. 6. Banner view for stored missions. 7. Transfer missions (export/import). 8. Missions routes layer can show a colorful path. 9. Redraw opened missions after IITC reloads.
